---
title: "Projects"
format:
  html:
    allow-html: true
---

# Project Portfolio

<div class="project-portfolio">
  <div class="card-grid">
    <div class="project-card">
      <img src="images/Stat_Arb.png" alt="Systematic Stat Arb" class="project-image">
      <div class="project-info">
        <h4>Systematic Stat Arb Trade Desk</h4>
        <ul>
          <li>Mean reversion & momentum (Python, R, SQL)</li>
          <li>Backtesting & execution engine</li>
          <li>Alpha-driven, real-time strategy</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card">
      <img src="images/Latency_Arbitrage.png" alt="Latency Arbitrage" class="project-image">
      <div class="project-info">
        <h4>Geo-Spatial Latency Arbitrage</h4>
        <ul>
          <li>Cross-market spread optimization</li>
          <li>Real-time rerouting with Prometheus, PowerShell, Grafana</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card">
      <img src="images/NLP_Pipelines.png" alt="NLP Pipelines" class="project-image">
      <div class="project-info">
        <h4>Alt Data NLP Pipeline</h4>
        <ul>
          <li>Extracts alpha from 10-Qs, earnings calls, filings</li>
          <li>Transformer models in multi-factor engines</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card">
      <img src="images/Monte_Carlo_and_Forecasting.png" alt="Forecast Engine" class="project-image">
      <div class="project-info">
        <h4>Monte Carlo + GARCH Forecasting</h4>
        <ul>
          <li>Equity price prediction engine</li>
          <li>Time-series + stochastic volatility (R, ggplot2)</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
